summary: Rate Manager (Toplu Güncellemeler) page redesign testing complete. Backend 14/14 tests passed. Frontend UI fully verified - 3-panel layout, all room types, update fields, day selection, and grid view working correctly. Channel Manager Rate tab redirect also working.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: 3-panel layout (left filters, center room types, right channels) implemented correctly
VERIFIED: All 3 room types (Standart, Deluxe, Suite) displayed in center panel with 5 rate plans each
VERIFIED: Left panel shows all update field checkboxes (Müsaitlik, Fiyat, Min/Max konaklama, CTA, CTD, Satışı durdur)
VERIFIED: Date range picker and day-of-week selection working (Hepsi + individual days)
VERIFIED: Right panel shows 16 channel checkboxes (Booking.com, Expedia, etc.)
VERIFIED: 'Tümünü seç' toggle for room types works
VERIFIED: Day selection toggles work (Hepsi toggles all, individual days work)
VERIFIED: Güncelle button posts to bulk-grid-update API successfully
VERIFIED: Sıfırla button resets all selections
VERIFIED: Takvim Görünümü tab shows date-based grid with prices and availability
VERIFIED: Grid navigation (prev/next week, Bugün) works
VERIFIED: Backend bulk-grid-update API supports day-of-week filtering
VERIFIED: Channel Manager Rate tab redirects to Toplu Güncellemeler page
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Exely connection data with 3 room types and 5 rate plans
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Rate Manager page at /rate-manager is fully redesigned as a HotelRunner-style 'Toplu Güncellemeler' interface. It has two tabs: 'Toplu Güncelle' (3-panel bulk update) and 'Takvim Görünümü' (calendar grid). The backend has POST /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/bulk-grid-update with day filtering support. The Channel Manager at /app/channel-manager Rate & Availability tab now redirects to this page.

3_panel_layout.details: Left (filters), Center (room types), Right (channels) panels all present

room_types_display.details: 3 room types (Standart, Deluxe, Suite) with 5 rate plans each displayed

update_field_checkboxes.details: All 7 fields present: availability, rate, min_stay, max_stay, cta, ctd, stop_sell

day_of_week_selection.details: 'Hepsi' toggle and 7 individual day toggles (Pazar-Cumartesi) working

channel_checkboxes.details: 16 channels with 'Hepsi' toggle in right panel

guncelle_button.details: Posts to bulk-grid-update API and shows success toast

sifirla_button.details: Resets all selections and form values

calendar_grid_view.details: Date-based grid with prices, availability, min stay, and stop sell indicators

grid_navigation.details: Prev/next week and Bugün buttons working

channel_manager_redirect.details: Rate & Availability tab shows redirect button to Toplu Güncellemeler

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/gr: 200 OK - Returns room_types (3), rate_plans (5), grid (15 rows)
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/b: 200 OK - Saves records and pushes to Exely
